message:
refactor(web): Remove duplicate /api/share-links/ routes

Consolidate to single /api/share/ implementation which is more secure:
- Uses POST /api/share/:code/verify for password verification
- Passwords in request body, not URL query params
- Prevents password leakage via server logs, browser history, Referer headers

The shared store (/lib/share-links/share-link-store.ts) is retained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
